videos.title: Sales Funnels
videos.description:
As a solopreneur, which sales funnel fits you best? 
In this episode we explore:

Sales Funnel Examples

Value Ladder Funnel
Free lead magnet (e.g., ebook or webinar)
Low-cost tripwire offer (under $20)
Core offer (main product or service)
High-ticket upsell (premium coaching or consulting)
Webinar Funnel
Free webinar registration
Live or automated webinar
Limited-time offer for attendees
Follow-up sequence for non-buyers
Product Launch Funnel
Pre-launch content (blog posts, videos)
Opt-in for e
